hero.title: Proofs, key details, and terms in one polished view.
hero.subtitle: Review the proof and payment gallery first, then scroll into a clean placeholder section built for highlights, privacy notes, and terms you can swap later.

stats.layout_value: Proof + payment stay paired together for fast review.

gallery.title: Proof board
gallery.note: Every card keeps the full proof and payment visible so the gallery stays clean, readable, and easy to scan on desktop or mobile.
gallery.empty_body: Your proof and payment pairs will appear here after the first upload.

overview.title: Placeholder sections you can replace later
overview.note: This area is set up to preview extra copy under the gallery. The wording below stays neutral on purpose so you can swap in your final version whenever you are ready.
